name: Salmon Croquettes
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 3/4 oz) pink salmon, drained, deboned, flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine salmon, 1/2 cup evaporated milk, 1/2 cup cornflake crumbs, dill pickle relish, celery, and onion; mix well.
2. Add enough dry bread crumbs to make the mixture less soupy.
3. With wet hands, shape 1/4 cupfuls into cones.
4. Roll each cone in remaining crumbs.
5. Heat oil in a deep-fat fryer to 365°F (185°C).
6. Fry croquettes, a few at a time, for 2 to 2 1/2 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Drain on paper towels and keep warm.
8. In a medium saucepan, combine tartar sauce ingredients; cook over medium heat until heated through and slightly thickened.
9. Serve warm with croquettes.
